subparts.text: Illustrate the types of colonnade surrounding the naos of a Greek temple. 1
How did the Greeks accomplish optical illusion in architecture? 2
Through which architectural components did the Roman cities ensure water supply for its urban citizens? 2
Describe the Tuscan order as was incorporated in Roman Architecture. 1
Explain the evolution of the Greek temple 2
Illustrate with the help of self-explanatory sketches, the Greek Temple architectural vocabulary through the orders. 1
Depict a brief explanation of the Palace of Knosos with the help of sketches. 1
Describe briefly the structural and engineering achievements of the Romans. 2
Briefly mention the Roman architectural typology and types of buildings with the help of sketches. 2
Illustrate the elements of space making and materials in Roman Architecture. 2
